DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS LISA CETLIN and JAMES MCDONELL'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT

Appearances:
Jason McDonnell and Lisa Cetlin (875-5820) defendants and moving parties appearing in propria persona
Anthony Giles of Logan & Giles (925-945-6792) for plaintiff and responding party

Argued and the Court modified its ruling as follows: overruled, 20 days to answer. Exhibit A to the complaint is sufficient to meet the requirements of Bus. & Prof. Code section 6148 (d)(3). The rendering of periodic bills and defendant's payments is sufficient to plead an account stated. Order signed in open Court. The parties were referred to Department 212 to set up a settlement conference. (302/PJM/xJL) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Stay Taking Of Deposition And To Quash Deposition Ntc And Mtn For Protective Order
Off Calendar Jul-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Telephonic Appearance:
Lisa Cetlin, for defendant and moving party in Propria Persona
Anthony D. Giles, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: William Logan, Jr.

After hearing, Defendant Lisa Cetlin's motion to stay taking of deposition, to quash deposition notice, and for a protective order is denied. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition, Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions.
Off Calendar Jul-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Telephonic Appearance:
Anthony D. Giles, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: William Logan, Jr.
Lisa Cetlin, for defendant and opposing party in Propria Persona

After hearing, Plaintiff William Logan's motion to compel deposition is Granted. Defendant shall be deposed on August 28 and 29 from 9:30 to 4:30 in San Francisco. The parties shall meet and confer as to producing documents prior to the deposition. all request for monetary sanctions are denied. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
